response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior IC with 13+ years of software development experience and clear strengths in testing, developer tooling (built a D test runner, assertion library, CI/CD setups), and full-stack web work. However, the role requires explicit people-management experience (2+ years) and technical leadership of teams, which is not evidenced in the resume — all positions are individual contributor roles, even at Staff level. There is also no mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android tooling, build systems for mobile) beyond a brief iOS/Apple TV stint a decade ago, and no evidence of leading organizational change.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling background: built test runner, assertion library, CI/CD pipelines, MCP code generators
13+ years of software engineering with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship and workshop teaching experience
Polyglot full-stack across web, mobile, desktop, embedded — broad technical judgment
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or direct-report leadership experience (role requires 2+ years)
Lacks mobile-platform ecosystem focus (build systems, test infra for iOS/Android at scale)
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership or leading organizational change
